items.title_en: “AI in networks isn’t CPU vs. GPU”: Intel unveils 18A-based Clearwater Forest Xeon 6+ for edge AI and early 6G infrastructure

items.title: Microsoft moves Build from Seattle back to San Francisco, scheduled for June 2-3, instead of May, and invites 2,500 developers, down from the usual ~3K to ~5K (Tom Warren/The Verge)
items.title_en: Microsoft moves Build from Seattle back to San Francisco, scheduled for June 2-3, instead of May, and invites 2,500 developers, down from the usual ~3K to ~5K (Tom Warren/The Verge)
items.title_zh: 微软将 Build 从西雅图移回旧金山，计划于 6 月 2 日至 3 日（而不是 5 月）举行，并邀请 2,500 名开发人员，从通常的约 3K 减少到约 5K（Tom Warren/The Verge）

items.title: Sharks new scrubbing-centric robot vacuum finds stains with a UV light. I tested it against other top robot mops.
items.title_en: Sharks new scrubbing-centric robot vacuum finds stains with a UV light. I tested it against other top robot mops.

items.title: Ziff Davis agrees to sell its Connectivity division, including Ookla and Downdetector, to Accenture for $1.2B in cash, to focus on enthusiast websites like IGN (Kritika Lamba/Reuters)
items.title_en: Ziff Davis agrees to sell its Connectivity division, including Ookla and Downdetector, to Accenture for $1.2B in cash, to focus on enthusiast websites like IGN (Kritika Lamba/Reuters)
items.title_zh: Ziff Davis 同意以 1.2 亿美元现金将其连接部门（包括 Ookla 和 DownDetector）出售给埃森哲，以专注于 IGN 等爱好者网站（Kritika Lamba/路透社）
